blended.narrative: Meadowlark is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 13 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,767 ft. Looking ahead, 27 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 50 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: flurries, highs of 26°F, gusts to 50 mph.
Tomorrow: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F, winds around 23 mph. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 27.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 22".
